programme.desc: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Antarctica
programme.desc: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: Country Ball

programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.

programme.title: Song of Texas (1943)
programme.desc: A cowboy singer rides into Texas and becomes entangled in a land dispute between honest settlers and a group of outlaws. Using both his quick wits and musical charm, he helps bring justice to the territory while protecting those caught in the conflict.

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies (1937)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy heads to the Rockies where he becomes involved in a dispute between ranchers and troublemakers threatening the peace of the region. With courage, quick thinking, and a few songs along the way, he works to restore order and protect those in danger.

programme.title: Sergeant Preston of the Yukon — S2:E19: Blind Justice (1956)
programme.desc: Sergeant Preston investigates a case involving a man accused of a crime he may not have committed. As he searches for the truth in the harsh Yukon territory, Preston uncovers evidence that challenges the initial judgment, determined to ensure that justice is served fairly

programme.title: Spook Town (1944)
programme.desc: A government agent travels to a remote town rumored to be haunted, where a series of mysterious events are being used to frighten residents away from valuable land. As he investigates, he uncovers a scheme by outlaws exploiting superstition to carry out their plans, and works to expose the truth and restore order.

programme.title: The Squaw Man (1931)
programme.desc: An English aristocrat accused of a crime he did not commit flees to the American West, where he starts a new life and falls in love with a Native American woman. As he builds a future on the frontier, his past returns to threaten the family he has created, forcing him to face difficult choices between honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: The Singing Cowgirl 1938
programme.desc: Dorothy Page saddles up as The Singing Cowgirl, bringing her golden voice and fearless spirit to the frontier! When rustlers and schemers threaten her family’s ranch, she fights back with courage, charm, and a song in her heart. Packed with action, romance, and toe-tapping tunes, this Western delivers a fresh twist on cowboy adventure.

programme.title: Apocalypse Joe 1970
programme.desc: In Apocalypse Joe, Anthony Steffen stars as a wandering gunslinger who inherits land in a lawless frontier town. When ruthless killers move in to claim it for themselves, Joe answers with blazing six-guns, deadly precision, and a flair for theatrical showdowns. Bursting with Spaghetti Western style—complete with brutal action, sweeping vistas, and a haunting score—this cult favorite turns vengeance into a deadly performance on the stage of the Wild West.

programme.title: Billy The Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element.

programme.title: Guns of Diablo
programme.desc: Wagon train scout Linc Murdock reminisces about his old feud with rancher Rance Macklin over pretty Maria during the time when Linc worked for the Macklin ranch.

programme.title: The Fighting Renegade
programme.desc: A government agent falsely accused of murdering a professor takes the identity of "The Puma", a Mexican vigilante leader, to hide his real identity and find the actual killers.

programme.title: Restaurants on the Radar: Pretty Plates
programme.desc: Ready to eat with your eyes? Brendan tastes some of the prettiest plates in Orlando, from candy-stuffed cookies that are almost too pretty to eat, to a cotton candy-topped soju cocktail that looks like a work of art.

programme.title: Finding Adventure: Double Amputee’s Inspiring Ride
programme.desc: Three years after his double amputation, Jeff in Albuquerque is ready to reconnect with nature. Kinga is there to root him on as he takes on challenging and inspiring outdoor adventures.

programme.title: Plate It Pittsburgh!: Thrill of the Grill
programme.desc: In this battle of the grill, Chef Todd Cassell and Chef Alekka Sweeney face-off to see who can bring home the bragging rights with their Pittsburgh inspired dishes.

programme.title: Wait, What Happened?: She Ate What Out of Her Pocket?
programme.desc: What strange snack did a woman eat at a football game? What ice cream flavor was inspired by a hot dog topping? Frank Nicotero is asking these questions and more, as Cincinnati locals try to win cash prizes.

programme.title: Boston Rob Does Beantown: Downtown Duels
programme.desc: Rob searches for secret rooms, blows off some steam and fire, and finds himself challenged to a duel when he ventures deep into Downtown Boston.
